reasoning: The recall was issued on April 24, 2025, leaving a relatively short window of 67 days (about 9.5 weeks) until the July 1, 2025 deadline. The recall involves roughly 64,000 pounds of product that was distributed to retail locations in New York, and it is a Class I recall, which typically mandates more rigorous and extensive FSIS recall effectiveness checks. The administrative process to verify that retailers have removed the product across various locations and completely process the closure on the FSIS website almost always takes several months; rapid closures (under 10 weeks) are usually reserved for much smaller, highly localized warehouse-level recalls where retail distribution didn't occur. Due to these logistical and administrative hurdles, the probability of standard FSIS processing completing this closure by July 1 is low.
batch_queries: Will the USDA-posted recall by ACC Central Kitchen LLC of pork bun products issued April 24, 2025 be closed before July 1, 2025?
